base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of good_ending — a ui (cutscene) from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Good Ending — earned by completing under 8 game-days. Shows Dracula resurrection implication, Simon walking away from castle. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Good Ending — earned by completing under 8 game-days. Shows Dracula resurrection implication, Simon walking away from castle; contains 5-7 cutscene frames in vertical strip. 'To be continued' setup for Castlevania III / Dracula's Curse narrative
